materials.title: Complete Guide to Video Production
materials.description: Master professional video production from pre-production to final delivery. Learn camera techniques, lighting, sound design, and post-production editing. Includes practical exercises and real-world examples.
materials.content:
## Chapter 1: Introduction to Video Production

Video production is the art of telling stories through moving images. This chapter covers the fundamentals.

### Key Concepts
- Pre-production: Planning and scripting
- Production: Shooting and capturing
- Post-production: Editing and finishing

### Equipment Overview
- Cameras: DSLR, Mirrorless, Cinema
- Lighting: Three-point lighting setup
- Audio: Microphones, recorders, mixers

## Chapter 2: Camera Techniques

Understanding aperture, shutter speed, ISO, and how they work together to create the perfect exposure.

## Chapter 3: Lighting Fundamentals

Master natural and artificial lighting to create mood, depth, and professional-looking footage.

## Chapter 4: Sound Design

Capture clean audio and design immersive soundscapes that enhance your visual story.

materials.title: UI/UX Design Mastery
materials.description: Learn the fundamentals of user interface and experience design. Master Figma, prototyping, user research, accessibility, and design systems. Build a professional portfolio as you learn.
materials.content:
## Module 1: Design Thinking

User-centered design methodology that solves real problems.

### The Five Phases
1. Empathize: Understand your users
2. Define: Frame the problem
3. Ideate: Generate solutions
4. Prototype: Create testable versions
5. Test: Validate with users

## Module 2: Figma Mastery

Learn components, auto layout, variants, and prototyping.

## Module 3: User Research

Conduct interviews, surveys, and usability tests to gather meaningful insights.

## Module 4: Accessibility

Design for everyone. WCAG guidelines, color contrast, screen readers, and inclusive design principles.

materials.title: JavaScript: The Complete Guide
materials.description: From beginner to advanced. Master JavaScript, ES6+, async programming, DOM manipulation, and modern frameworks. Includes hundreds of code examples and challenges.

materials.title: Motion Graphics with After Effects
materials.description: Create stunning animations and motion graphics. Learn keyframing, expressions, visual effects, and compositing. Master industry-standard techniques for broadcast and social media.
materials.content:
## Lesson 1: Interface & Workflow

Navigating After Effects, importing assets, and setting up compositions.

## Lesson 2: Keyframing Animation

Basic keyframes, easing, graph editor, and motion blur.

## Lesson 3: Shape Layers & Vector Graphics

Creating and animating shape layers for logo reveals and motion graphics.

## Lesson 4: Text Animation

Text animators, presets, and kinetic typography.

## Lesson 5: Expressions

Automate animation with JavaScript expressions for efficient workflows.

materials.title: Branding & Identity Design
materials.description: Build powerful brands from scratch. Learn logo design, color theory, typography, brand strategy, and visual identity systems. Real-world case studies included.
materials.content:
## Chapter 1: What is Branding?

Beyond logos: brand strategy, positioning, personality, and voice.

## Chapter 2: Logo Design

Types of logos, design principles, and the creative process.

## Chapter 3: Color Theory

Psychology of color, color harmonies, and building a color palette.

## Chapter 4: Typography

Font pairings, hierarchy, and creating a typographic system.

## Chapter 5: Brand Guidelines

Creating a comprehensive brand book for consistent application.

materials.title: Python for Data Science
materials.description: Learn Python programming for data analysis, visualization, and machine learning. Covers NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, and introductory ML concepts.
materials.content:
## Unit 1: Python Basics

Variables, loops, conditionals, functions, and list comprehensions.

## Unit 2: NumPy

Array operations, broadcasting, and mathematical functions.

## Unit 3: Pandas

Series, DataFrames, data cleaning, grouping, and merging.

## Unit 4: Data Visualization

Matplotlib and Seaborn for creating insightful charts and graphs.

## Unit 5: Introduction to Machine Learning

Scikit-learn, train/test split, and basic regression models.

materials.title: Audio Production & Sound Design
materials.description: Master audio recording, mixing, mastering, and sound design. Learn industry-standard DAWs, microphone techniques, and post-production audio.
materials.content:
## Section 1: Recording Basics

Microphone types, polar patterns, gain staging, and recording techniques.

## Section 2: Digital Audio Workstations

Setting up a DAW, session organization, and basic editing.

## Section 3: Mixing

EQ, compression, reverb, delay, and panning for balanced audio.

## Section 4: Mastering

Final polish: loudness, EQ, limiting, and export settings.

## Section 5: Sound Design

Creating sound effects, Foley, and atmospheric audio for film and games.

materials.title: Web Design with Figma
materials.description: Learn web design from scratch using Figma. Master wireframing, prototyping, responsive design, and collaboration tools. Perfect for aspiring UI/UX designers.
materials.content:
## Module 1: Getting Started with Figma

Interface, frames, shapes, text, and basic tools.

## Module 2: Wireframing

Low-fidelity layouts for planning information architecture.

## Module 3: High-Fidelity Design

Colors, typography, images, and components.

## Module 4: Auto Layout & Constraints

Responsive design that adapts to different screen sizes.

## Module 5: Prototyping

Interactive prototypes with transitions and micro-interactions.

materials.title: Full-Stack Web Development Bundle
materials.description: Complete web development ecosystem. Includes: HTML/CSS, JavaScript, React, Node.js, MongoDB, and 10 real-world projects.
materials.content:
## Bundle Contents

### Course 1: HTML & CSS Fundamentals
Build responsive websites from scratch.

### Course 2: JavaScript Essentials
Interactive web development.

### Course 3: React.js
Build dynamic user interfaces.

### Course 4: Node.js & Express
Backend API development.

### Course 5: MongoDB Database
Data persistence and modeling.

### Course 6: 10 Real-World Projects
Portfolio, E-commerce, Blog, Dashboard, and more.

### Bonus: Developer Toolkit
VS Code extensions, Git workflow, deployment guides.

materials.title: Creative Media Production Pack
materials.description: Everything you need for professional media production. Includes: Video Production Guide, Motion Graphics Mastery, Audio Production, plus 50+ templates, presets, and sound effects.
materials.content:
## Bundle Contents

### Course 1: Video Production Guide
Complete guide to shooting professional video.

### Course 2: Motion Graphics Mastery
After Effects animation techniques.

### Course 3: Audio Production
Recording, mixing, and mastering.

### Course 4: Sound Design
Creating immersive audio experiences.

### Bonus Resources
- 50+ Motion Graphics Templates
- 100+ Sound Effects Library
- 20+ Video LUTs
- Production Checklist Templates

materials.title: Design Resource Toolkit
materials.description: Ultimate design resource pack. Includes: UI/UX Design Mastery, Branding & Identity, Web Design with Figma, plus 100+ UI components, 50+ mockups, and font bundles.
materials.content:
## Bundle Contents

### Course 1: UI/UX Design Mastery
Complete user experience design workflow.

### Course 2: Branding & Identity
Build powerful brands from scratch.

### Course 3: Web Design with Figma
Responsive web design projects.

### Bonus Resources
- 100+ UI Components Library
- 50+ Device Mockups
- 30+ Font Pairings
- Design System Template
- Social Media Templates Pack

materials.title: Cinematography & Lighting
materials.description: Master the art of visual storytelling. Learn camera angles, composition, lighting techniques, color grading, and shot design. Perfect for aspiring filmmakers.
materials.content:
## Chapter 1: Camera Fundamentals

Sensor sizes, lens selection, and camera movement.

## Chapter 2: Composition

Rule of thirds, leading lines, framing, and depth.

## Chapter 3: Lighting Techniques

Three-point lighting, natural light, and mood creation.

## Chapter 4: Color Grading

Color theory, grading workflows, and creating looks.

## Chapter 5: Shot Design

Storyboarding, shot sizes, and sequence building.

materials.title: React: From Zero to Expert
materials.description: Master React.js including hooks, context, state management, routing, and performance optimization. Build real-world applications including an e-commerce site and dashboard.
materials.content:
## Part 1: React Fundamentals

Components, props, state, and JSX.

## Part 2: Hooks Deep Dive

useState, useEffect, useContext, useReducer, and custom hooks.

## Part 3: State Management

Context API, Redux Toolkit, and Zustand.

## Part 4: Routing

React Router for multi-page experiences.

## Part 5: Performance

Memoization, code splitting, and optimization techniques.

## Part 6: Real-World Projects

E-commerce site, admin dashboard, and portfolio builder.
